name: chr2_centromere_alpha_satellite
description: Chromosome 2 alpha-satellite array (D2Z1). The chr2 centromere is the unique surviving centromere of the ancestral ape chr2A-chr2B fusion; the inactive ancestral centromere of chr2B persists at 2q21.2 as a fossil satellite remnant.

architecture.internal_structure: Alpha-satellite HOR array D2Z1 of 1-3 Mb; flanking pericentric SDs at 2p11.2 and 2q11.1; fossil ancestral-centromere remnant at 2q21.2.
